description: Phase 8 evaluation question set (docs/plan.md, docs/phase-8.md). in_corpus_questions have a known-correct source, verified against corpus/manifest.json's real section outlines -- not invented. out_of_corpus_questions are copied verbatim from docs/phase-1.md's 6 deliberate corpus gaps and are expected to trigger the refusal gate, not grounded retrieval.

in_corpus_questions.question: What is the vesting schedule for Contoso's retirement savings plan company match?
in_corpus_questions.expected_document_title: Contoso Corp Retirement Savings Plan Guide
in_corpus_questions.expected_section_path: Contoso Corp Retirement Savings Plan Guide > Vesting Schedule

in_corpus_questions.question: What is the PTO accrual rate for full-time employees?
in_corpus_questions.expected_document_title: Contoso Corp Paid Time Off and Leave Policy
in_corpus_questions.expected_section_path: Contoso Corp Paid Time Off and Leave Policy > Paid Time Off (PTO) > Accrual Rates

in_corpus_questions.question: How many unused PTO days can I carry over into the next calendar year?
in_corpus_questions.expected_document_title: Contoso Corp Paid Time Off and Leave Policy
in_corpus_questions.expected_section_path: Contoso Corp Paid Time Off and Leave Policy > Paid Time Off (PTO) > Carryover and Payout

in_corpus_questions.question: What are Contoso's password and multi-factor authentication requirements?
in_corpus_questions.expected_document_title: Contoso Corp Information Security and Acceptable Use Policy
in_corpus_questions.expected_section_path: Contoso Corp Information Security and Acceptable Use Policy > Password and Authentication Requirements

in_corpus_questions.question: Who should I contact to report a suspected phishing email?
in_corpus_questions.expected_document_title: Contoso Corp Information Security and Acceptable Use Policy
in_corpus_questions.expected_section_path: Contoso Corp Information Security and Acceptable Use Policy > Reporting Security Incidents

in_corpus_questions.question: What is the home office equipment stipend for remote employees?
in_corpus_questions.expected_document_title: Contoso Corp Remote Work and Flexible Work Arrangements Policy
in_corpus_questions.expected_section_path: Contoso Corp Remote Work and Flexible Work Arrangements Policy > Home Office Equipment and Stipend

in_corpus_questions.question: What should employees do during a fire alarm evacuation?
in_corpus_questions.expected_document_title: Contoso Corp Workplace Health and Safety Policy
in_corpus_questions.expected_section_path: Contoso Corp Workplace Health and Safety Policy > Emergency Procedures > Fire Evacuation

in_corpus_questions.question: How is mileage reimbursed when I use my personal vehicle for business travel?
in_corpus_questions.expected_document_title: Contoso Corp Business Travel and Expense Reimbursement Policy
in_corpus_questions.expected_section_path: Contoso Corp Business Travel and Expense Reimbursement Policy > Reimbursable Expenses > Personal Vehicle Mileage

in_corpus_questions.question: Who is eligible for overtime pay at Contoso?
in_corpus_questions.expected_document_title: Contoso Corp Compensation and Pay Practices Policy
in_corpus_questions.expected_section_path: Contoso Corp Compensation and Pay Practices Policy > Overtime Eligibility

out_of_corpus_questions.question: How does my RSU vesting schedule work?
out_of_corpus_questions.gap_topic: Equity compensation / stock options / RSU vesting
out_of_corpus_questions.adjacent_covered_topic: Compensation and Pay Practices Policy (base pay, pay grades, overtime, merit increases -- explicitly not equity)

out_of_corpus_questions.question: Am I eligible for a sabbatical after 5 years?
out_of_corpus_questions.adjacent_covered_topic: Paid Time Off and Leave Policy (PTO, sick leave, bereavement, jury duty -- no sabbatical)

out_of_corpus_questions.question: Does Contoso sponsor a work visa if I relocate internationally?
out_of_corpus_questions.adjacent_covered_topic: Remote Work / Business Travel policies (flexible location and expense reimbursement -- not immigration)

out_of_corpus_questions.question: What's the company car allowance for my role?
out_of_corpus_questions.adjacent_covered_topic: Business Travel and Expense Policy (personal vehicle mileage reimbursement -- not a company-provided vehicle)

out_of_corpus_questions.question: What's the severance package for a VP-level termination?
out_of_corpus_questions.adjacent_covered_topic: Offboarding and Separation Policy (standard resignation/termination/layoff -- not executive-specific terms)

out_of_corpus_questions.question: What's the tuition reimbursement cap for a part-time MBA?
out_of_corpus_questions.gap_topic: Tuition reimbursement for external degree programs
out_of_corpus_questions.adjacent_covered_topic: Learning and Professional Development Policy (internal training, certification exam fees, conferences -- not degree tuition)
